user.title: Solar Load Split
user.description: Choose the grid import/export power sensor once. After optional inversion: positive = grid import, negative = grid export. Solar Load Split will use this sensor to discover matching device power sensors.

hub.title: Configure grid sensor
hub.description: Choose a grid import/export power sensor. After optional inversion: positive = grid import, negative = grid export.

discovery_confirm.title: Solar Load Split discovered power sensors

manual_device.title: Add device manually
manual_device.description: Choose a device power sensor. If a base entry was detected, the grid sensor is already prefilled.

abort.already_configured: This device and grid sensor pair is already configured.
abort.discovery_missing: The discovered sensor information is no longer available.
